zh.lifeSummary: Lora de Fauconberge是Sir William de Fauconberg的女兒，於1290年出生在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾斯凱爾頓。她於大約1311年與Herbert Saint Quintin III在英國多瑟特福洛 聖 昆丁結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1348年之後在英國越可爾卡特福斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lora de Fauconberge是Sir William de Fauconberg的女儿，于1290年出生在英国英格兰諾斯 越可爾斯凱爾頓。她于大约1311年与Herbert Saint Quintin III在英国多瑟特福洛 聖 昆丁结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1348年之后在英国越可爾卡特福斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lora
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably a respelling of   Laura  , that coincides in form with the German spelling of the same name and also with the medieval English given name.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: Lora de Fauconberge was born in 1290, in Skelton, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Sir William de Fauconberg. She married Herbert Saint Quintin III about 1311, in Frome St Quintin, Dorset, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died after 1348, in Catfoss, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lora de Fauconberge est née en 1290, à Skelton, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Sir William de Fauconberg. Elle a épousé Herbert Saint Quintin III environ 1311, à Frome St Quintin, Dorset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 1348, à Catfoss, Everwyck, Angleterre.

Sie hat um 1311 in Frome St Quintin, Dorset, England Herbert Saint Quintin III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1348 in Catfoss, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lora de Fauconbergeは1290年にイギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアスケルトンでSir William de Fauconbergの娘として生まれた。約1311年にイギリスドールセトフロメ スト クインティンでHerbert Saint Quintin IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1348年以後にイギリスヨークシュアイアカトフォスで死去した。

ko.Frome St Quintin, Dorset, England, Great: 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 프롬 스트 퀸틴
ko.lifeSummary: Lora de Fauconberge(은)는 1290년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 스켈턴에서 Sir William de Fauconberg의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1311년 영국 도르세트 프롬 스트 퀸틴에서 Herbert Saint Quintin III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1348년 이후 영국 요르크실르 카트포스에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Lora de Fauconberge nasceu em 1290, em Skelton, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Sir William de Fauconberg. Ela casou-se com Herbert Saint Quintin III aproximadamente 1311, em Frome St Quintin, Dorset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 1348, em Catfoss, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Frome St Quintin, Dorset, England, Great: фром ст куинтинь, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Lora de Fauconberge родилась в 1290 г. в местности скелтон, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Sir William de Fauconberg. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Herbert Saint Quintin III около 1311 г. в местности фром ст куинтинь, дорсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 1348 г. в местности катфосс, еркшир, Англия.

Se casó con Herbert Saint Quintin III aproximadamente 1311, en Frome St Quintin, Dorset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija.
